title: Feels So Good
why_this_song: Feels So Good by Chuck Mangione (1977) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Feel so good when I'm with you"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Feel so good when I'm with you"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "With you it feels like it should feel"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: There's no place for me to hide
Your name is music to my heart

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: The thoughts of all the time I cried
Feel so good when I'm with you

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Feels So Good" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Feels So Good"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Chuck Mangione one question about "Feels So Good", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Chuck Mangione sobre "Feels So Good", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Feels So Good" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Feels So Good" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
